description: AFSIM scenario generation error taxonomy for static checking, mission execution analysis, and baseline reporting.

categories.name: missing_or_invalid_unit
signals: numeric command argument has no physical unit
categories.repair_hint: Fill unit from IR; if absent, use component default unit and mark repair_assumed_unit.

categories.name: missing_or_mismatched_end_tag
signals: end tag does not match current block
categories.repair_hint: Use stack-based block matching and insert the matching end_xxx for the nearest unclosed block.

categories.name: undefined_reference
signals: string API reference does not match a mounted component
categories.repair_hint: Build symbol tables for definitions and references; rename to an existing grounded object or add the missing grounded definition.

categories.name: invalid_coordinate_format
signals: latitude or longitude has no hemisphere suffix
altitude has no unit or reference
categories.repair_hint: Normalize coordinates from structured IR fields and regenerate position lines.

categories.name: hallucinated_entity_or_type
signals: WSF_ prefix type not in the verified-type whitelist (note: whitelist may be incomplete; a flagged type may be valid in AFSIM but not yet verified)
domain entity not mapped to a known template
type name used as a top-level command (e.g., WSF_SPHERICAL_LETHALITY on its own line)
categories.repair_hint: Compare against the verified-type whitelist. If the type is valid in AFSIM but not in the whitelist, add it to the whitelist and reclassify. If truly hallucinated, reject ungrounded entities; map user concepts to known templates or mark grounding_missing.
categories.known_limitation: The static checker uses a hardcoded whitelist of WSF_ types. Types that are valid in AFSIM 2.9.0 but absent from the whitelist WILL be misclassified as E005. The whitelist must be expanded as new types are verified against mission.exe.

categories.name: missing_required_field
categories.repair_hint: Fill minimal required fields from IR or nearest demo template; route semantic gaps back to IR repair.

categories.name: component_syntax_mismatch
signals: parameter appears in unsupported component block
required sub-block missing (e.g., radar sensor without transmitter)
command not allowed for component type
valid AFSIM keyword used as top-level command when it must be nested (e.g., task, command_chain, antenna_pattern at script root)
sub-component keyword used as a standalone command (e.g., weapon_type, sensor_type)
categories.repair_hint: Render components from type-specific templates and move parameters into legal sub-blocks. For nested keywords, always wrap inside the parent block (task inside processor, command_chain inside platform, etc.).

categories.name: script_api_or_language_error
categories.zh_name: 脚本 API 或语言错误
signals: unsupported fmod, percent operator, ternary operator, cast
API method name does not exist on target class (e.g., WsfMessage.Source(), WsfMover.Speed(), WsfSimulation.Time())
void script function returns a value
type cast error (e.g., implicit cast from double to string)
categories.repair_hint: Use print(), direct on_initialize/on_update bodies, time-delta checks, and only API methods validated against script_api_reference.md. For method calls, verify the method exists on the target class in the AFSIM Script API reference.

categories.name: file_or_execution_environment_error
categories.repair_hint: Run from a writable mirrored directory, create output folders, set cwd to script directory, and separate environment errors from generation errors.

categories.name: task_semantic_mismatch
signals: script executable but does not match expected_ir_focus
categories.repair_hint: Compare extracted script IR with requested IR and regenerate the mismatched layer.
